specs.title: duplicate Email header surfaces in review step and import proceeds with default ignore
imports 5 contacts end-to-end and lands in pending-review

specs.title: contacts CSV with SSN-format values in an extra column is rejected
re-import with update strategy stages 5 changes and approve applies them

specs.title: donations CSV with 5 ambiguous-email rows surfaces 5-row error table and downloads errored-rows CSV

suites.title: Donations importer — Map Columns row indicator

specs.title: mapping select exposes a search input when opened
Import Site analyzes the bundle on upload and reveals gated toggles
Memos item create modal mounts QuillEditor (not Trix)
Memos item save round-trip persists Quill-authored content
toggle off baseline — op_b sees Edit and Delete on op_a-authored note
toggle on — op_b cannot see Edit / Delete on op_a-authored note
toggle on + edit_others_note granted — op_b can edit again
text_block (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
text_block (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
text_block (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
hero (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
hero (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
hero (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
nav (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
nav (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
nav (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
normalizes (bg:false, content:true) to bg:true semantics
column-layout (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
column-layout (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
column-layout (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
widget inside a column with both knobs true is still clamped to (false, false)

editor renders gradient bg set via DB on a column

suites.title: Per-template content scheme — three surfaces, scheme-switched

specs.title: PUBLIC default scheme = identity (content region == the Theme .np-site value)
PUBLIC inverse scheme: content region follows, chrome holds (compose-not-bleed)
ADMIN: --np-color-* tokens still do not leak into Filament
PREVIEW reverts with the scheme: default → back to the Theme value

suites.title: Universal border — Text widget public render

specs.title: renders a bordered Text widget with the expected computed border-*
ADMIN: --np-color-* tokens do not leak into Filament
